Idempotency key conflicts with an existing request
Idempotency key conflicts with an existing request

bearerAuth.description: Memory-only access token (never store in cookies or Web Storage).

csrfHeader.description: Double-submit CSRF header paired with the readable CSRF cookie.
csrfHeader.name: x-csrf-token

info.description: Contract-first OpenAPI 3.1 projection for frozen M1 and M2 counter contracts. Auth paths come solely from AUTH_OPERATION_MATRIX. Bus commands/queries come from M1_FIRST_WAVE_DEFINITIONS and M2_CONTRACT_DEFINITIONS. Errors use the A2 CommandResponse / CommandFailureResponse envelope.
info.title: Laundry Desk v2 API

post.description: Browser auth operation `login` (ingress: lifecycle_http). Registry command: `identity.login`. Allowed public errors: VALIDATION_FAILED, AUTHENTICATION_FAILED, CSRF_REJECTED, RATE_LIMITED, TRANSACTION_FAILED, EVENT_DISPATCH_FAILED. Projection source: AUTH_OPERATION_MATRIX (A5/A7). Server-only hashes and factories are omitted.
post.summary: Auth login

post.description: Browser auth operation `logout` (ingress: lifecycle_http). Registry command: `identity.logout`. Allowed public errors: VALIDATION_FAILED, AUTHENTICATION_FAILED, CSRF_REJECTED, RATE_LIMITED, TRANSACTION_FAILED, EVENT_DISPATCH_FAILED. Projection source: AUTH_OPERATION_MATRIX (A5/A7). Server-only hashes and factories are omitted.

parameters.description: Double-submit CSRF proof; must match the readable CSRF cookie value.
parameters.name: x-csrf-token

post.summary: Auth logout

post.description: Browser auth operation `pin_challenge` (ingress: browser_session). Allowed public errors: VALIDATION_FAILED, AUTHENTICATION_FAILED, PERMISSION_DENIED, RESOURCE_UNAVAILABLE, CSRF_REJECTED, RATE_LIMITED, INVARIANT_FAILED, TRANSACTION_FAILED, EVENT_DISPATCH_FAILED. Projection source: AUTH_OPERATION_MATRIX (A5/A7). Server-only hashes and factories are omitted.

parameters.description: Double-submit CSRF proof; must match the readable CSRF cookie value.
parameters.name: x-csrf-token

post.summary: Auth pin_challenge

post.description: Browser auth operation `pin_verify` (ingress: browser_session). Allowed public errors: VALIDATION_FAILED, AUTHENTICATION_FAILED, PERMISSION_DENIED, RESOURCE_UNAVAILABLE, CSRF_REJECTED, RATE_LIMITED, INVARIANT_FAILED, TRANSACTION_FAILED, EVENT_DISPATCH_FAILED. Projection source: AUTH_OPERATION_MATRIX (A5/A7). Server-only hashes and factories are omitted.

parameters.description: Double-submit CSRF proof; must match the readable CSRF cookie value.
parameters.name: x-csrf-token

post.summary: Auth pin_verify

post.description: Browser auth operation `refresh` (ingress: lifecycle_http). Registry command: `identity.refresh`. Allowed public errors: VALIDATION_FAILED, AUTHENTICATION_FAILED, CSRF_REJECTED, RATE_LIMITED, TRANSACTION_FAILED, EVENT_DISPATCH_FAILED. Projection source: AUTH_OPERATION_MATRIX (A5/A7). Server-only hashes and factories are omitted.

parameters.description: Double-submit CSRF proof; must match the readable CSRF cookie value.
parameters.name: x-csrf-token

post.summary: Auth refresh

post.description: Upsert customer by org+phone. Optional name/note. Returns customer_id, phone, name, created flag. Integer timestamps only. Stable command name: `customer.upsert` @ 0.2.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: Create or update an org customer profile by phone.

post.description: Verify org/store/username/password for a device and open a session. Never log or project the password. Stable command name: `identity.login` @ 1.0.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: Authenticate staff with password and establish browser session cookies.

post.description: End the browser session and clear refresh/CSRF cookies under CSRF proof. Stable command name: `identity.logout` @ 1.0.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: Revoke the current refresh family and clear auth cookies.

post.description: Issue a short-lived PIN challenge bound to quick_switch or step_up purpose. Does not accept the PIN itself. Stable command name: `identity.pin_challenge` @ 1.0.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: Create a single-use PIN challenge for quick switch or step-up.

post.description: Submit PIN for a challenge_id. On success returns session switch or step-up proof. Never project the PIN. Stable command name: `identity.pin_verify` @ 1.0.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: Verify PIN against an open challenge for quick switch or step-up proof.

post.description: Consume the httpOnly refresh cookie under CSRF proof and return a new access token. No password body. Stable command name: `identity.refresh` @ 1.0.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: Rotate refresh session and issue a new memory-only access token.

post.description: Cancel one open order only with a non-empty reason. Runtime writes auditable reversals; it never deletes ledger rows. Stable command name: `order.cancel` @ 0.2.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: Cancel an open order with a mandatory reason and auditable reversal plan.

post.description: Hold one open counter order. A reason is required; no payment ledger is written. Stable command name: `order.hold` @ 0.2.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: Hold an open order with a required operator reason.

post.description: Pickup garments by id (or all pickable). collect_cents settles balance; status must allow picked_up. Stable command name: `order.pickup` @ 0.2.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: Mark selected garments picked up and record cash collection.

post.description: Open a counter order: expand each line qty into garments at received status. Integer cents only. Stable command name: `order.receive` @ 0.2.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: Create an open order with line items expanded into garments (receive).

post.description: Collect a positive integer-fen payment. Offline collection requires the store Primary lease. Stable command name: `payment.collect` @ 0.2.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: Append a counter collection payment to an order ledger.

post.description: Refund only online with step-up approval. Reference the original payment and provide a reason; never mutate the original ledger row. Stable command name: `payment.refund` @ 0.2.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: Append an online-only R4 refund referencing an original payment.

post.description: Record a positive integer-fen debt repayment. The payment ledger is append-only. Stable command name: `payment.repay` @ 0.2.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: Append a repayment for an order with outstanding debt.

post.description: Append photo metadata for a garment on an order. kind in receive|defect|ready|other. byte_size positive integer. storage_key opaque path/key. Returns photo_id and row fields. Integer timestamps only. Stable command name: `photo.register` @ 0.2.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: Register garment photo metadata (opaque storage_key; no blob upload).

post.description: Persist settings key/value pairs. System settings are R5 and never AI-projectable. Stable command name: `platform.settings.set` @ 1.0.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: Update system/store settings entries (high risk).

post.description: Queue a counter ticket print job (kind xp58|dl206|gp3120). Returns job_id with status queued. No device I/O. Stable command name: `print.ticket.enqueue` @ 0.2.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: Enqueue a ticket print job bound to an order and ticket number.

post.description: Load print job by job_id. kind must be xp58. Transition queued→printing, build ESC/POS payload, set payload_bytes and status done. On error mark failed with error text. No USB/device I/O. Stable command name: `print.ticket.process` @ 0.2.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: Process a queued XP-58 print job: build ESC/POS bytes and mark done or failed.

post.description: Load print job by job_id. Source status must be done. Enqueue a NEW print_jobs row with same order_id, ticket_no, kind. Do not mutate the done row. Returns new job (may auto-process xp58 to done). No device I/O paths stored. Stable command name: `print.ticket.reprint` @ 0.2.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: Reprint a done print job by enqueueing a new job with the same order/ticket/kind.

post.description: Load print job by job_id. Source status must be failed. Enqueue a NEW print_jobs row with same order_id, ticket_no, kind. Do not mutate the failed row. Returns new job (may auto-process xp58 to done). No device I/O paths stored. Stable command name: `print.ticket.retry` @ 0.2.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: Retry a failed print job by enqueueing a new job with the same order/ticket/kind.

post.description: Append-only shift close for one business_date. Snapshots order_count and integer-fen totals. Rejects second close same day. signature_name is display text only. Stable command name: `shift.close` @ 0.2.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: Close a store business day with signature name and day-summary snapshot.

post.description: Lookup a single catalog item by code. Return empty when not found. Stable query name: `catalog.items.get` @ 0.2.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: Get one catalog item by stable code.

post.description: Return store catalog rows (code, name, service, category, unit_price_cents, mnemonic). Integer cents only; never invent prices. Stable query name: `catalog.items.list` @ 0.2.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: List catalog price items with optional free-text filter.

post.description: Return org-scoped customer rows (customer_id, phone, name, note, updated_at). Match phone prefix or name substring. max 50 rows; default limit 20. Stable query name: `customer.search` @ 0.2.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: Search org customer profiles by phone prefix or name contains.

post.description: Fetch order by id with garment list (id, barcode, status, line_index, seq, unit_price_cents). PII may appear. Stable query name: `order.get` @ 0.2.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: Load one order summary and its garments for counter pickup.

post.description: Return store orders newest-first: order_id, ticket_no, status, customer_phone/name, payable/paid/balance cents, created_at, optional garment_count. Filter by UTC business_date, status, exact customer_phone, and/or min_balance_cents (integer fen floor on balance). Debt panel: min_balance_cents=1, limit<=50, omit business_date. Default limit 20, max 50. PII phone masked in audit. Stable query name: `order.list` @ 0.2.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: List recent store orders for workbench / history / receivables browsing.

post.description: Return photos for order_id (photo_id, garment_id, kind, storage_key, content_type, byte_size, taken_at). max 100 rows. Metadata only. Stable query name: `photo.list_by_order` @ 0.2.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: List garment photo metadata rows for one order (no blobs).

post.description: Query audit_log rows in [from,to] with a hard row cap. PII may appear. Stable query name: `platform.audit.list` @ 1.0.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: List audit events in a time window (read-only).

post.description: Fetch settings for the declared keys only. Never invent keys. Stable query name: `platform.settings.get` @ 1.0.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: Read store/org settings values by key list.

post.description: Return store_features flags for IA and capability gates. Stable query name: `platform.store_features.get` @ 1.0.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: Read feature flags for one store.

post.description: Return newest-first print job status rows (job_id, kind, status, order_id, ticket_no, timestamps, optional error/payload_bytes). Stable query name: `print.jobs.list` @ 0.2.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: List recent print job status views (no device paths).

post.description: Return shift row for business_date (shift_id, closed_at, fen totals, signature_name) or null. max 1 row. Stable query name: `shift.get` @ 0.2.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: Load shift closing record for one business date, or null if not closed.

post.description: Return day-level counters and integer-fen sums for orders created on business_date (UTC). max 1 row. Stable query name: `stats.day.summary` @ 0.2.0. HTTP body is the registry input (args). C1 wire envelope fields (command, version, idempotency_key, dry_run, mode) wrap this payload at the bus boundary. Responses use the unified A2 CommandResponse envelope.
post.summary: Daily revenue summary for one business date (order and payment aggregates).
